sectionAria: Yaayatoo mobile app: key features and intelligent offer-to-profile matching

steps.title: Manage offers, contracts & calendar in one place
steps.description: Run your home-help activity from a single hub: publish and edit offers, follow contract status and signatures, and keep visits and deadlines visible on your calendar—so nothing slips between messages and spreadsheets.
bullets: Create, update, or pause offers with clear statuses—draft, live, or filled—without losing context.
Track contracts end-to-end: versions, signatures, and next steps always attached to the right offer.
Calendar view for visits, renewals, and reminders synced with your offers and contracts.

steps.title: Real-time alerts, notifications & smart tips
steps.description: Stay ahead with instant alerts and in-app notifications tied to what matters: new or updated offers, wallet and payout events, profile matches, and booking changes—plus short tips that deep-link you straight to the right screen.
bullets: Real-time push and in-app alerts when an offer, visit, or contract step changes—open the exact detail in one tap.
Notifications for payments and wallet activity (payouts, top-ups, reminders) so you always know where money moved.
Tips and nudges for strong profile matches, expiring opportunities, and follow-ups—each linked to offers, matches, or messages.

steps.title: Pay in the app with your wallet
steps.description: Handle money where you already manage work: families can settle offer payments smoothly in the app, while household professionals get paid, review their balance, and track income over time—all in one wallet.
bullets: For families: confirm and pay for offers from the app with a clear, guided flow—less admin, fewer mistakes.
For professionals: receive payouts to your in-app wallet, see what you earned, and follow upcoming transfers.
History and tracking in one place so both sides always know what was paid, when, and for which offer.

steps.title: Intelligent offer–profile matching
steps.description: Yaayatoo pairs home-help offers with the right profiles automatically. Household professionals get recommended, relevant jobs and timely alerts—families receive top-matching candidates for each offer so you compare faster, hire with confidence, and keep everyone engaged.
bullets: For professionals: see offers that fit your profile (skills, availability, travel area) with less irrelevant browsing.
Smart notifications when a high-fit offer opens so you can apply or reply while it still matters.
For families: get ranked profile suggestions aligned with your offer, schedule, and household needs—shorter shortlists, better first matches.
Clear next steps, reminders, and in-app messages help both sides move from interest to booking with fewer back-and-forths.
